query_result.query:
WITH success AS (
  WITH combined AS (
    -- 1) Engine creation success metrics
    SELECT
      DATE(submission_timestamp) AS date,
      labeled_metrics.key       AS engine_id,
      'engine_creation'         AS metric_type,
      CAST(values.key AS INT64) AS ms
    FROM firefox_desktop.metrics
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.metrics.labeled_timing_distribution.firefox_ai_runtime_engine_creation_success) AS labeled_metrics
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(labeled_metrics.value.values) AS values
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(1, values.value)) AS repeat_number
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
      AND client_info.app_channel IN ('nightly', 'beta', 'release')

    UNION ALL

    -- 2) Inference success metrics
    SELECT
      DATE(submission_timestamp) AS date,
      labeled_metrics.key       AS engine_id,
      'inference'               AS metric_type,
      CAST(values.key AS INT64) AS ms
    FROM firefox_desktop.metrics
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(metrics.metrics.labeled_timing_distribution.firefox_ai_runtime_run_inference_success) AS labeled_metrics
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(labeled_metrics.value.values) AS values
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(1, values.value)) AS repeat_number
    WHERE
      DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
      AND client_info.app_channel IN ('nightly', 'beta', 'release')
  )
  SELECT
    date,
    engine_id,

    -- Engine creation quantiles
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'engine_creation', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(5)] / 1e6 AS engine_creation_p5,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'engine_creation', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(50)] / 1e6 AS engine_creation_p50,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'engine_creation', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(75)] / 1e6 AS engine_creation_p75,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'engine_creation', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(99)] / 1e6 AS engine_creation_p99,

    -- Inference quantiles
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'inference', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(5)] / 1e6   AS inference_p5,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'inference', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(50)] / 1e6  AS inference_p50,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'inference', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(75)] / 1e6  AS inference_p75,
    APPROX_QUANTILES(IF(metric_type = 'inference', ms, NULL), 100)[OFFSET(99)] / 1e6  AS inference_p99,

    -- Success counts
    COUNTIF(metric_type = 'engine_creation') AS engine_creation_success_count,
    COUNTIF(metric_type = 'inference')       AS inference_success_count

  FROM combined
  GROUP BY
    date,
    engine_id
),

failures AS (
  WITH combined AS (
    -- Engine creation failures
    SELECT
      DATE(submission_timestamp)         AS date,
      JSON_VALUE(event_extra.engineId)   AS engine_id,
      'engine_creation'                  AS metric_type,
      COUNT(*)                           AS failure_count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.events_stream`
    WHERE
      event = 'firefox.ai.runtime.engine_creation_failure'
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
      AND normalized_channel IN ('nightly', 'beta', 'release')
    GROUP BY
      date,
      engine_id

    UNION ALL

    -- Inference failures
    SELECT
      DATE(submission_timestamp)         AS date,
      JSON_VALUE(event_extra.engineId)   AS engine_id,
      'inference'                        AS metric_type,
      COUNT(*)                           AS failure_count
    FROM `mozdata.firefox_desktop.events_stream`
    WHERE
      event = 'firefox.ai.runtime.run_inference_failure'
      AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
      AND normalized_channel IN ('nightly', 'beta', 'release')
    GROUP BY
      date,
      engine_id
  )
  SELECT
    date,
    engine_id,
    SUM(IF(metric_type = 'engine_creation', failure_count, 0)) AS engine_creation_failure_count,
    SUM(IF(metric_type = 'inference',       failure_count, 0)) AS inference_failure_count
  FROM combined
  GROUP BY
    date,
    engine_id
)

-- Finally, join successes & failures into one result
SELECT
  COALESCE(s.date, f.date) AS date,
  COALESCE(s.engine_id, f.engine_id) AS engine_id,

  -- Success quantiles
  s.engine_creation_p5,
  s.engine_creation_p50,
  s.engine_creation_p75,
  s.engine_creation_p99,
  s.inference_p5,
  s.inference_p50,
  s.inference_p75,
  s.inference_p99,

  -- Success counts
  s.engine_creation_success_count,
  s.inference_success_count,

  -- Failure counts
  f.engine_creation_failure_count,
  f.inference_failure_count

FROM success s
FULL JOIN failures f
USING (date, engine_id)
ORDER BY
  engine_id,
  date;
